description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu opened 12 pull requests in qiuethan/Misty, numbered #106 through #117 except #? and worked 13 hrs 38 mins total in WakaTime, averaging 2 hrs 39 mins per day. His tracked work included Python, Markdown, SQL, and TypeScript.
